privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes the 'food.gdt' dataset, which contains real household survey data (from Principles of Econometrics 5th Edition). The agent's output is expected to be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/joint_test_results.txt'. A dynamic ground truth file containing the expected F-statistic and p-value is generated by a gretlcli script and securely saved at '/var/lib/gretl/ground_truth_test.txt' for the verifier to evaluate against.
